title: Reviews from the people who dine with us.
subtitle: Real feedback from our valued guests on Google Reviews.

items.name: Prakash
items.quote: Good food for people like south indian food, bit costly with respect to the food. Almost ₹400/- per head for a vegeterian meal which we felt is on higher side in comparison to equivalent restaurants in Bangalore.

items.name: Saravana Kumar
items.quote: Good atmosphere. Normal taste... Chicken is spicy. Overall a decent dining experience for families.

items.name: Sonam Mehta
items.quote: Ambience is very good they provide us good environment n service food taste every thing is very nice. We can do kitty parties birthday parties all parties for that seperate party room is their.

items.name: Prathibha R
items.quote: Restaurant decoration and furnitures are very attractive to the customers. I liked painting which is made for photo clicks.

items.name: Bhoomika Shetty
items.quote: Food taste was good. I have visited almost 3-4 times being as it's my native. The ambience and overall feel of the restaurant is welcoming.
